tif.tagspecs

    • Method Detail

      • getNumberID

        public int getNumberID()
        Specified by:
        getNumberID in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        the 16-bit numerical Tag ID (e.g., 0x0100 for ImageWidth)

      • getHint

        public TagHint getHint()
        Specified by:
        getHint in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        the expected data type or format hint for this tag

      • getDirectoryType

        public DirectoryIdentifier getDirectoryType()
        Specified by:
        getDirectoryType in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        the IFD where this tag is valid

      • isUnknown

        public boolean isUnknown()
        Specified by:
        isUnknown in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        true if this represents a tag not explicitly defined in the specification

      • getDescription

        public java.lang.String getDescription()
        Specified by:
        getDescription in interface Taggable
        Returns:
        a human-readable name or description of the tag
